name: Quaker State 400 Available at Walmart
comments: Joey Logano won the Quaker State 400 Available at Walmart at Atlanta Motor Speedway, his 34th NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start the following car dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason indicated: #11, 19, 54 (unapproved adjustments).
